recent_form_summary: Most dominant player of the tournament: swept Dart, Klugman, Maria, and Pliskova (6-4 6-1 in the semifinal) without dropping a set.
stat_trend_summary: Hit 6 aces across four matches this week (~1.5/match) including only 1 vs Pliskova in the semifinal; 2026 season average ~1.23/match, clearing 0.5 in roughly two-thirds of matches historically.
opponent_factor_summary: Navarro is a strong, disciplined returner (broke Golubic 6 times in her own semifinal), which could suppress Bouzkova's ace count below her week-long pace.
notes: Week-long ace rate hovers right around the 0.5 line, and her most recent (semifinal) match -- the closest stylistic proxy to facing a quality returner -- produced only 1 ace, so confidence is medium rather than high.
